ns0:entry.ns0:title: Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
Language: python
The 30 Days of Python programming challenge is a step-by-step guide to learn the Python programming language in 30 days. This challenge may take more than 100 days. Follow your own pace. These videos may help too: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7PNRuno1rzYPb1xLa4yktw

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemPalace/mempalace
Language: python
The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
Language: python
小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

Language: python
Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: commaai/openpilot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/commaai/openpilot
Language: python
openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hugohe3/ppt-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master
Language: python
AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He

ns0:entry.ns0:title: luongnv89/claude-howto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/luongnv89/claude-howto
Language: python
A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mealie-recipes/mealie
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mealie-recipes/mealie
Language: python
Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moorcheh-ai/memanto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moorcheh-ai/memanto
Language: python
Memory that AI Agents Love!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opendatalab/MinerU
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU
Language: python
Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: safishamsi/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: topoteretes/cognee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee
Language: python
Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xbtlin/ai-berkshire
Language: python
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
